# ExpenseVision

> AI-powered expense tracking with smart receipt scanning, budget management, and financial insights.

## About

ExpenseVision is a modern personal finance app built with Next.js, Supabase, and AI-powered receipt scanning. It helps users track expenses, manage budgets, scan receipts with OCR, and get AI-generated financial insights.

## Pages

- [Home](https://expensevision.tech): Landing page with features overview, testimonials, and demo access
- [Login](https://expensevision.tech/login): Sign in to your account
- [Sign Up](https://expensevision.tech/signup): Create a new account
- [Forgot Password](https://expensevision.tech/forgot-password): Reset your password
- [Dashboard](https://expensevision.tech/dashboard): Overview of spending, budgets, and recent activity
- [Expenses](https://expensevision.tech/expenses): Add, edit, and manage all expenses
- [Budgets](https://expensevision.tech/budgets): Set and track monthly budgets by category
- [Receipts](https://expensevision.tech/receipts): Scan receipts with AI-powered OCR
- [AI Insights](https://expensevision.tech/insights): AI-generated spending analysis and savings tips
- [Settings](https://expensevision.tech/settings): Profile, security, currency, and data preferences
- [Demo](https://expensevision.tech/demo): Try the app with sample data — no account required

## Features

- **AI Receipt Scanning**: Upload receipt photos and extract merchant, amount, date, category, and line items automatically using multimodal AI
- **Smart Budget Tracking**: Set monthly budgets per category with real-time progress tracking and alerts
- **AI Financial Insights**: Get personalized spending summaries, savings tips, budget alerts, and trend analysis
- **Multi-Currency Support**: USD, EUR, GBP, INR, JPY, AED (with official UAE Dirham symbol), CAD, AUD, SGD
- **Dark/Light/System Theme**: Full theme support with glassmorphism design
- **Secure by Design**: Supabase Auth with Row Level Security, rate limiting, and security headers

## Tech Stack

- Next.js (App Router)
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS v4
- Supabase (Auth, Database, Storage)
- Google Gemini API via OpenRouter (OCR + AI Insights)
- Upstash Redis (Rate Limiting)
- shadcn/ui with @base-ui/react
- Recharts, Lucide React, date-fns, zod, sonner

## API

- `POST /api/expenses` — Create expense
- `GET /api/expenses` — List user expenses
- `PATCH /api/expenses/[id]` — Update expense
- `DELETE /api/expenses/[id]` — Delete expense
- `POST /api/budgets` — Create budget
- `GET /api/budgets` — List user budgets
- `DELETE /api/budgets/[id]` — Delete budget
- `GET /api/analytics` — Spending analytics
- `POST /api/ocr` — Scan receipt image (multipart/form-data)
- `POST /api/ai-insights` — Generate AI financial insights
